title: Visualizing Multivariate Linearization and Taylor Series Expansion
description: A diagram illustrating the progression from a multivariate function to its linear approximation (tangent plane) and higher-order Taylor series approximations, showing the improvement in accuracy.
elements: Error Region between function and approximation
relationships: The Tangent Plane is built using the Gradient of f at (a,b)
The Second-Order Approximation incorporates the Hessian Matrix of second derivatives
Higher-order approximations include more terms from the multivariate Taylor series formula
All approximations are centered at the point (a,b) and become more accurate near this point
